mapper.sql: s.MY_SCHEDULE_ID, s.TITLE AS SCH_TITLE, s.START_AT, s.IS_SHARED, p.TITLE AS PLACE_TITLE, p.ADDR1, p.FIRST_IMAGE, v.VISIT_ORDER
FROM MY_SCHEDULE s JOIN VISIT_ITEM v ON s.MY_SCHEDULE_ID = v.SCHEDULE_ID JOIN PLACE p ON v.PLACE_ID = p.PLACE_ID
mapper.select:
SELECT
WHERE s.USER_ID = #{userId} UNION ALL SELECT
JOIN SCHEDULE_SHARE_USER ssu ON s.MY_SCHEDULE_ID = ssu.MY_SCHEDULE_ID WHERE ssu.SHARED_USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY START_AT DESC, VISIT_ORDER ASC

SELECT
WHERE s.USER_ID = #{userId} UNION ALL SELECT
JOIN SCHEDULE_SHARE_USER ssu ON s.MY_SCHEDULE_ID = ssu.MY_SCHEDULE_ID WHERE ssu.SHARED_USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY SCH_TITLE ASC, VISIT_ORDER ASC

SELECT
WHERE s.USER_ID = #{userId} AND s.IS_SHARED = 1 UNION ALL SELECT
JOIN SCHEDULE_SHARE_USER ssu ON s.MY_SCHEDULE_ID = ssu.MY_SCHEDULE_ID WHERE ssu.SHARED_USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY START_AT DESC, VISIT_ORDER ASC

SELECT
WHERE s.USER_ID = #{userId} AND s.IS_SHARED = 1 UNION ALL SELECT
JOIN SCHEDULE_SHARE_USER ssu ON s.MY_SCHEDULE_ID = ssu.MY_SCHEDULE_ID WHERE ssu.SHARED_USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY SCH_TITLE ASC, VISIT_ORDER ASC

SELECT
WHERE s.USER_ID = #{userId} AND (s.TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR p.TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%') UNION ALL SELECT
JOIN SCHEDULE_SHARE_USER ssu ON s.MY_SCHEDULE_ID = ssu.MY_SCHEDULE_ID WHERE ssu.SHARED_USER_ID = #{userId} AND (s.TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR p.TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%') ORDER BY START_AT DESC, VISIT_ORDER ASC

SELECT
WHERE s.USER_ID = #{userId} AND (s.TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR p.TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%') UNION ALL SELECT
JOIN SCHEDULE_SHARE_USER ssu ON s.MY_SCHEDULE_ID = ssu.MY_SCHEDULE_ID WHERE ssu.SHARED_USER_ID = #{userId} AND (s.TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR p.TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%') ORDER BY SCH_TITLE ASC, VISIT_ORDER ASC

SELECT
WHERE s.USER_ID = #{userId} AND s.IS_SHARED = 1 AND (s.TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR p.TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%') UNION ALL SELECT
JOIN SCHEDULE_SHARE_USER ssu ON s.MY_SCHEDULE_ID = ssu.MY_SCHEDULE_ID WHERE ssu.SHARED_USER_ID = #{userId} AND (s.TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR p.TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%') ORDER BY START_AT DESC, VISIT_ORDER ASC

SELECT
WHERE s.USER_ID = #{userId} AND s.IS_SHARED = 1 AND (s.TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR p.TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%') UNION ALL SELECT
JOIN SCHEDULE_SHARE_USER ssu ON s.MY_SCHEDULE_ID = ssu.MY_SCHEDULE_ID WHERE ssu.SHARED_USER_ID = #{userId} AND (s.TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR p.TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%') ORDER BY SCH_TITLE ASC, VISIT_ORDER ASC

SELECT
WHERE s.USER_ID = #{userId} AND s.IS_SHARED = 1
AND (s.TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR p.TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')
UNION ALL SELECT
JOIN SCHEDULE_SHARE_USER ssu ON s.MY_SCHEDULE_ID = ssu.MY_SCHEDULE_ID WHERE ssu.SHARED_USER_ID = #{userId}
AND (s.TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR p.TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')
ORDER BY SCH_TITLE ASC, VISIT_ORDER ASC ORDER BY START_AT DESC, VISIT_ORDER ASC
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM MY_SCHEDULE WHERE MY_SCHEDULE_ID = #{scheduleId} AND USER_ID = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE MY_SCHEDULE SET TITLE = #{title} WHERE MY_SCHEDULE_ID = #{myScheduleId} AND USER_ID = #{userId}
UPDATE MY_SCHEDULE SET TODO_DETAILS = #{todoDetail} WHERE MY_SCHEDULE_ID = #{scheduleId}
UPDATE MY_SCHEDULE SET BUDGET_DETAILS = #{budgetDetail} WHERE MY_SCHEDULE_ID = #{scheduleId}
UPDATE MY_SCHEDULE SET START_AT = TO_DATE(#{startAt}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') WHERE MY_SCHEDULE_ID = #{scheduleId} AND USER_ID = #{userId}
UPDATE SCHEDULE_SHARE_USER SET PERMISSION = #{permission} WHERE MY_SCHEDULE_ID = #{myScheduleId} AND SHARED_USER_ID = #{sharedUserId}
mapper.select: SELECT TODO_DETAILS FROM MY_SCHEDULE WHERE MY_SCHEDULE_ID = #{scheduleId}
SELECT BUDGET_DETAILS FROM MY_SCHEDULE WHERE MY_SCHEDULE_ID = #{scheduleId}
SELECT TITLE FROM MY_SCHEDULE WHERE MY_SCHEDULE_ID = #{scheduleId}
SELECT TO_CHAR(START_AT, 'YYYY-MM-DD') FROM MY_SCHEDULE WHERE MY_SCHEDULE_ID = #{scheduleId}
SELECT 'SCH' || LPAD(SEQ_MY_SCHEDULE.NEXTVAL, 3, '0') FROM DUAL
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MY_SCHEDULE WHERE MY_SCHEDULE_ID = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MY_SCHEDULE (MY_SCHEDULE_ID, TITLE, START_AT, USER_ID, IS_SHARED) VALUES (#{myScheduleId}, #{title}, SYSDATE, #{userId}, 0)
INSERT INTO VISIT_ITEM (VISIT_ITEM_ID, VISIT_ORDER, SCHEDULE_TYPE, PLACE_ID, SCHEDULE_ID) VALUES (SEQ_VISIT_ITEM.NEXTVAL, #{visitOrder}, 'MY_SCH', #{placeId}, #{scheduleId})
INSERT INTO SCHEDULE_SHARE_USER (SHARE_ID, PERMISSION, MY_SCHEDULE_ID, SHARED_USER_ID) VALUES (SEQ_SCHEDULE_SHARE_USER.NEXTVAL, 'R', #{myScheduleId}, #{sharedUserId})

INSERT INTO VISIT_ITEM (VISIT_ITEM_ID, VISIT_ORDER, DISTANCE_TO_NEXT, SCHEDULE_TYPE, PLACE_ID, SCHEDULE_ID) SELECT SEQ_VISIT_ITEM.NEXTVAL, VISIT_ORDER, DISTANCE_TO_NEXT, 'POST', PLACE_ID, ('P' || LPAD(SEQ_SCHEDULE_POST.CURRVAL, 3, '0')) FROM VISIT_ITEM WHERE SCHEDULE_ID = #{myScheduleId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MY_SCHEDULE WHERE MY_SCHEDULE_ID = #{scheduleId} AND USER_ID = #{userId}

SELECT v.VISIT_ITEM_ID, v.VISIT_ORDER, p.PLACE_ID, p.TITLE FROM MY_SCHEDULE s JOIN VISIT_ITEM v ON s.MY_SCHEDULE_ID = v.SCHEDULE_ID JOIN PLACE p ON v.PLACE_ID = p.PLACE_ID WHERE v.SCHEDULE_ID = #{scheduleId} ORDER BY v.VISIT_ORDER ASC

SELECT p.TITLE, v.VISIT_ORDER, p.MAPX, p.MAPY, v.DISTANCE_TO_NEXT FROM MY_SCHEDULE s JOIN VISIT_ITEM v ON s.MY_SCHEDULE_ID = v.SCHEDULE_ID JOIN PLACE p ON v.PLACE_ID = p.PLACE_ID WHERE s.MY_SCHEDULE_ID = #{scheduleId} ORDER BY v.VISIT_ORDER ASC
SELECT U.USER_ID, U.NAME, U.EMAIL, SSU.PERMISSION FROM SCHEDULE_SHARE_USER SSU JOIN USERS U ON SSU.SHARED_USER_ID = U.USER_ID WHERE SSU.MY_SCHEDULE_ID = #{myScheduleId}
